source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Please choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image, ignoring the arrows. <image_1>
extraction_notes: answer field is option label "C"; mapped to choice text
image field exists as a PIL.Image object representation, but no path/URL is present

issues: metadata.extraction_notes states the source image field had no path/URL and only a PIL.Image object representation
metadata.image_paths is empty despite a top-level image path being present

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says the transition-state structure is shown in the image
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the task cannot be solved from text alone
the answer requires identifying a depicted chemical structure rather than extracting a textual clue
multi_step: the solver must interpret the chemical diagram in the image and then compare it against 5 SMILES choices
question_text adds an instruction to ignore the arrows, which introduces an extra filtering step during visual interpretation
this is still a single-target multiple-choice matching task, so the step count is moderate rather than high
verifiability: choices are provided and answer_text='[NH4+]' matches one option exactly
answer_type='short_text' with a short canonical-looking chemistry string is easy to compare exactly
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and answer_present=true support straightforward outcome checking

risk_flags: metadata.extraction_notes states the source image field had no path/URL and only a PIL.Image object representation
metadata.image_paths is empty despite a top-level image path being present

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像均存在，核心语义资产完整，未出现题干与图像同时缺失的情况
该题高度依赖图像，但登记记录中的主图像文件实际存在，可支撑后续理解与核验
答案可与给定选项精确比对，verifiability_score 高，保留价值较高
当前风险主要是元数据中的图像路径记录不一致，而不是核心内容资产缺失
